source.body_text_sample:
ABOUT US
CONTENT
DISTRIBUTION
CHANNELS
NEWS
WORK WITH US
CAREERS
At Cineflix we are committed to attracting enthusiastic, energetic, and experienced people while providing them with a dynamic, inviting, and flexible working environment. We strive to create opportunities and reward people who contribute to our success. We are an Equal Opportunity Employer. Here is more information on our compliance with the Accessibility for Ontarians with Disabilities Act and our Multi-Year Accessibility Plan. Cineflix stands in solidarity with Black and Indigenous communities, people of colour, and LGBTQ+ across our industry and the globe.  As a media company, we recognize that we have the responsibility to use our storytelling platform to fight for inclusion, accountability, and change. We are committed to doing our part to strive for justice and opportunity, and to connect as a unified community representing all races, orientations, and abilities. Please Note: Recruitment-related scams from illegitimate companies have increased. If you are being considered for a position with Cineflix Media or with one of our subsidiary/partner companies, you will only be contacted by someone from our recruitment team with an official @cineflix.com email address.  
AVAILABLE POSITIONS
Senior Producer, Digital Originals
